metadata.title: File Order
metadata.description: Use number-prefixes in your file names to define a custom order, and drag-and-drop the files to update that order

regex.source: Notice("Prefix min length must be a number above or equal zero.")
regex.target: Notice("前缀最小长度必须是大于或等于零的数字。")

regex.source: Notice("Starting index must be a number above or equal zero.")
regex.target: Notice("起始索引必须是大于或等于零的数字。")

regex.source: .error("forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported")
regex.target: .error("帧率必须是0到125之间的正整数，不支持超过125帧每秒的帧率")
name:"重新排序顶层文件夹中的项目"

regex.source: text:'To reorder files, right click on any file in the file explorer, and click on "Reorder items".'
regex.target: text:'要重新排序文件，请在文件浏览器中右键点击任意文件，然后点击“重新排序”。'

regex.source: .setDesc("Prefix numbers will be padded to that length if they are shorted, i.e. 001 instead of 1")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果前缀数字较短，将会填充到指定长度，例如：使用001代替1")

regex.source: .setDesc("Delimiter between prefix number and title. May be multiple characters.")
regex.target: .setDesc("前缀数字和标题之间的分隔符，可以是多个字符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("RegEx of files and folder to ignore. Eg: ^index\\.md$ to ignore index.md files")
regex.target: .setDesc("要忽略的文件和文件夹的正则表达式。例如：^index\\\\.md$ 表示忽略index.md文件")

regex.source: .setDesc("In a folder named MyFolderName, ignore MyFolderName.md")
regex.target: .setDesc("在名为MyFolderName的文件夹中，忽略MyFolderName.md文件")

regex.source: text:'The following settings are defaults for when items are reordered for the first time in a folder. Subsequent reorders will always reuse the existing settings for the respective folder, and the settings can be changed per folder by clicking the down-icon-button in the reorder view next to the "Files" or "Folders" headers.'
regex.target: text:'以下设置是首次对文件夹中的项目重新排序时的默认设置。后续重新排序时将始终沿用该文件夹的现有设置。您可以通过点击重排序视图中“文件”或“文件夹”标题旁的下拉图标按钮来更改每个文件夹的设置。'
